business.target_audience: East Bay Area contractors (quick price/availability checks) + new residential customers (Google searches for Kohler/Grohe in Oakland) — both need to feel they're talking to a real specialty supplier, not a chain.
differentiators: Two physical showrooms — customers can touch premium fixtures before buying
Three-generation family ownership, 46 years on the same East Bay block
Trade-grounded knowledge — staff has decades of plumbing experience
Specialty supplier vs faceless big-box retailer

no_no_imagery: generic plumbing icons (faucet drawings, pipe wrench)
branding.preferred_palette_direction: warm neutral base (cream / warm white / off-white) + one dark accent (deep navy or forest green — 'trade trust') + Kohler-black for important details. No bright gradients, no neons.
branding.typography_direction: trade serif wordmark (Cormorant / Domaine / Tiempos family), readable in monogram. NOT Inter, NOT modern SaaS sans.
branding.logo_status: none — current site uses default Times New Roman wordmark; build a fresh typographic wordmark from scratch, no plumbing-icon clichés (no faucet, no pipe wrench).

content.main_message: Specialty plumbing for the East Bay since 1980 — come touch the premium brands at our Oakland showroom.

secondary_cta.label: Call 510-652-7437
secondary_cta.intent: phone lead for repeat trade buyers

tertiary_cta.label: Send a custom request
tertiary_cta.details: simple contact form for non-standard inquiries

key_offers: A.O. Smith and Takagi tankless water heaters
Flexible piping, fittings, and standard plumbing supply
anti_claims: DO NOT claim Kohler Authorized Dealer status (not verified)
DO NOT claim BBB membership (not verified)
DO NOT use unverifiable counts ('thousands of contractors trust us', '5000+ projects')
DO use only verifiable facts: brands carried, 46 years in business, three-generation family ownership, Oakland location

deployment.domain: moransupply.com (production untouched for smoke test; staging on belbes subdomain)

deadlines.notes: Staging URL ASAP — Daniel wants to show co-owners before production cutover.
